meaning: adj.[医](器官,组织等)发育不全的,[生]细胞减生
examples: It took shorter time for the hypoplastic enamel powder to attain an equilibrium than the normal did.
Aortic atresia is not compatible with continued survival as seen in hypoplastic left heart syndrome.
Objective: To evaluate the efficacy of Norwood procedure for treating hypoplastic left-heart syndrome (HLHS).
As a result, the right ventricle is usually very small and underdeveloped (hypoplastic).
